channel.title: Blog on Unknown Entity 1806
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Unknown Entity 1806

item.title: The process of drawing an Iris fairy
item.description: The perk of being the creative friend is that you can make something meaningful without paying a premium for it.

item.title: Making a game: dev diary #4
item.description: You struggle and struggle and then… the world is at your fingertips!

item.title: Making a game: dev diary #3
item.description: At the start you think, ah this is easy. Then as you dive in, you realize you only saw the top of the iceberg…

item.title: Making a game: code diary #2
item.description: Sharing the start of my solo game dev journey! Look at some of the very first sketches 💜

item.title: Playing with code diary #1
item.description: 👋 Hi! This is a new kind of blog post I am making. As I am currently playing around with learning to code more and I kind of wish to document this journey. It is mostly for myself so that I do not forget certain ideas or stuff I did, but perhaps you might enjoy joining me on this journey as well!

item.title: Updates: A time for relaxation
item.description:
Hello 👋

It is time for me to give you another monthly update. Although the previous one was not really that long ago.

The weather here in Spain has not been great the past few weeks. Which means that the plans I had to spend outside have not come to fruition.
Instead I have spend more time behind the computer and playing around with HUGO. I have learned alot. Which has also motivated me to update the theme for this website to version 3.1: lilac-code! 💜

item.title: Updates for April 2026
item.description: Hello everyone! I am back with another monthly update and it is really crazy much fast time has passed, but also, how much has happened in the meantime!

item.title: Updates for March 2026
item.description: Another month, another update on what has been going on in my life.

item.title: Updates for February 2026
item.description: Another month, another update on what is going on behind the scenes.

item.title: Updates for January 2026
item.description: A little bit of my works in progress in January. Some might be finished this month. Others are more ideas that are for further in the future.

item.title: Draw & Chat 01: New Year Resolutions
item.description: In this first Draw & Chat I chat a little bit about my New Year Resolutions (or intentions) and show you the process of me drawing a chibi version of my original character Chloe.
